title: Slap af Frede!
writer: Jens K. Holm, Henning Bahs, Erik Balling
actors: Morten Grunwald, Ove Sprogøe, Hanne Borchsenius
plot: A Chinese diplomat is kidnapped in Genève and the world peace is at risk. The trail leads to Denmark and the danish secret service brings in their best agent, Smith. To accompany Smith they once again turn to novelty salesman Fred...
